title: TR 2013/5 solution still being sought

summary: The search for a solution to the tax ruling TR 2013/5 continues, as stakeholders seek clarity on its implications for superannuation funds and tax deductions. This ongoing issue affects how certain financial products are treated under Australian tax law.
heading: Superannuation and Investments
key_points: TR 2013/5 relates to tax deductions for superannuation funds.
Stakeholders are looking for clarity on its impact.
The resolution of this issue is still pending.
ticker_line: Ongoing search for TR 2013/5 tax ruling solution
